name: data and distributed sources: every entry in both catalogs has an id, name, and url
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'Encoding.default_external=Encoding::UTF_8; r=ENV["CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"]; ok=%w[data-architecture distributed-systems].all?{|f| YAML.unsafe_load_file(r+"/standards/#{f}-sources.yaml").all?{|e| e["id"]&&e["name"]&&e["url"].to_s.start_with?("http")}}; exit(ok ? 0 : 1)' && echo structured 1>&2
